title: Master Data Governance & Enrichment
guardrails: Packets are advisory: MDM merges, API Hub staging promotion, enrichment publishes, connector edits, mapping retries, and ingestion replays stay in governed steward/API Hub workflows.

Queue review and approve actions write audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they never mutate master data, staging rows, enrichment drafts, connectors, or ingestion runs silently.

steps: Sign in with API Hub, settings, products, suppliers, or reports edit access.
Open /assistant/master-data-governance-enrichment and click Create Sprint 21 packet.
Confirm AssistantMasterDataGovernancePacket persists with governanceScore and dimensional JSON.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without MDM or API Hub mutations.

steps: Queue MDM governance review with optional steward note.
scenarios.passWhen: Status REVIEW_QUEUED and audit answerKind sprint21_mdg_rev recorded.

steps: Approve packet after data steward sign-off.
Verify sprint21_mdg_ok audit narrative denies automatic merges, staging, enrichment, and connector changes.
scenarios.passWhen: Status APPROVED; AMP21 runs, staging batches, hub reviews, jobs, and ingestion state unchanged.
